---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-28"
---



``` {r lvad srtr}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# GET SRTR LVAD TIMELINE FROM DEVICE FILE WITH EXPLANT LOGIC
# ============================================================================

lvad_keywords <- c("heartmate", "hm", "lionheart", "arrow", "jarvik", "micromed", 
                   "debakey", "novacor", "evaheart", "worldheart", "levacor", 
                   "reliantheart", "hvad", "heartsaver")

# Get all LVAD implants from thor_support_device
srtr_lvad_implants <- thor_support_device %>%
  filter(VadBrandId %in% c('202', '205', '206', '207', '208', '209', '210', '212', 
                           '213', '214', '223', '224', '233', '236', '239', '240', 
                           '312', '313', '314', '315', '316', '319', '322', '327', 
                           '330', '333', '334') | 
           (VadBrandId == 999 & grepl(paste(lvad_keywords, collapse = "|"), 
                                      OtherSpecify, ignore.case = TRUE))) %>%
  group_by(PX_ID) %>%
  arrange(ImplantDt) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(PX_ID, lvad_implant_date = ImplantDt)

cat("Total SRTR patients with LVAD from device file:", nrow(srtr_lvad_implants), "\n")

# Get status history to identify explants (Status 5/6 with no return to Status 1-4)
status_history <- stathist_thor2025q2 %>%
  select(PX_ID, CANHX_BEGIN_DT, CANHX_END_DT, CANHX_STAT_CD) %>%
  mutate(
    status_numeric = case_when(
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1110, 2110) ~ 1,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1120, 2120) ~ 2,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1130, 2130) ~ 3,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1140, 2140) ~ 4,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1150, 2150) ~ 5,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1160, 2160) ~ 6,
      TRUE ~ 99
    )
  ) %>%
  inner_join(srtr_lvad_implants, by = "PX_ID") %>%
  filter(CANHX_BEGIN_DT >= lvad_implant_date) %>%  # Only status periods after LVAD
  arrange(PX_ID, CANHX_BEGIN_DT)

# Identify presumed explants: Status 5/6 with no return to Status 1-4
first_status56 <- status_history %>%
  filter(status_numeric %in% c(5, 6)) %>%
  group_by(PX_ID) %>%
  arrange(CANHX_BEGIN_DT) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(PX_ID, first_56_date = CANHX_BEGIN_DT)

returned_to_active <- status_history %>%
  inner_join(first_status56, by = "PX_ID") %>%
  filter(status_numeric %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4) & CANHX_BEGIN_DT > first_56_date) %>%
  distinct(PX_ID)

presumed_explants_device <- first_status56 %>%
  filter(!PX_ID %in% returned_to_active$PX_ID) %>%
  select(PX_ID, explant_dt = first_56_date)

cat("Patients with presumed explant (Status 5/6, no return):", nrow(presumed_explants_device), "\n")

# Merge implant and explant dates
srtr_lvad_timeline <- srtr_lvad_implants %>%
  left_join(presumed_explants_device, by = "PX_ID")

# ============================================================================
# PREVALENCE ANALYSIS WITH EXPLANT CENSORING
# ============================================================================

dates_to_check <- c(
  mdy("10-18-2018"),
  seq(mdy("01-01-2019"), mdy("07-01-2025"), by = "2 months") - days(1)
)

get_srtr_lvad_prevalence <- function(check_date) {
  
  cat("Processing SRTR date:", format(check_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
  
  candidates_on_date <- cand_thor2025q2 %>%
    filter(CAN_LISTING_DT <= check_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(CAN_REM_DT) | CAN_REM_DT > check_date) %>%
    filter(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12 > 17) %>%
    select(PX_ID, CAN_LISTING_DT, CAN_REM_DT)
  
  candidates_with_lvad <- candidates_on_date %>%
    left_join(srtr_lvad_timeline, by = "PX_ID") %>%
    mutate(
      has_lvad = !is.na(lvad_implant_date) & 
        lvad_implant_date <= check_date &
        (is.na(explant_dt) | explant_dt > check_date)
    )
  
  total_waitlist <- nrow(candidates_on_date)
  total_with_lvad <- sum(candidates_with_lvad$has_lvad, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(data.frame(
    date = check_date,
    total_waitlist = total_waitlist,
    total_with_lvad = total_with_lvad
  ))
}

prevalence_results_list <- lapply(dates_to_check, get_srtr_lvad_prevalence)
prevalence_results_df <- bind_rows(prevalence_results_list)

prevalence_results_df <- prevalence_results_df %>%
  mutate(
    lvad_proportion = total_with_lvad / total_waitlist * 100,
    date_label = format(date, "%b %d, %Y"),
    date_factor = factor(date_label, levels = date_label)
  )

prevalence_results_df %>%
  select(date_label, total_waitlist, total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion) %>%
  mutate(lvad_proportion = round(lvad_proportion, 2)) %>%
  kable(format = "simple", 
        col.names = c("Date", "Total Waitlist", "Total with LVAD", "LVAD %"),
        align = c('l', 'r', 'r', 'r'))

# ============================================================================
# FLOW/INCIDENCE ANALYSIS
# ============================================================================

period_starts <- seq(mdy("01-01-2019"), mdy("06-01-2025"), by = "2 months")
period_ends <- period_starts %m+% months(2) - days(1)

get_srtr_lvad_flow <- function(start_date, end_date) {
  
  cat("Processing SRTR period:", format(start_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "to", format(end_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
  
  # Get all candidates on waitlist during this period
  candidates_in_period <- cand_thor2025q2 %>%
    filter(CAN_LISTING_DT <= end_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(CAN_REM_DT) | CAN_REM_DT >= start_date) %>%
    filter(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12 > 17) %>%
    select(PX_ID, CAN_LISTING_DT, CAN_REM_DT)
  
  # Join with LVAD timeline
  candidates_with_lvad <- candidates_in_period %>%
    left_join(srtr_lvad_timeline, by = "PX_ID")
  
  # 1. NEW LISTINGS WITH LVAD (listed during period, already had LVAD at listing)
  new_listings_with_lvad <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(CAN_LISTING_DT >= start_date & CAN_LISTING_DT <= end_date) %>%
    filter(!is.na(lvad_implant_date) & lvad_implant_date <= CAN_LISTING_DT) %>%
    nrow()
  
  # 2. LVAD IMPLANTS WHILE ON WAITLIST (got first LVAD during period, already on waitlist)
  lvad_implants_on_waitlist <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(!is.na(lvad_implant_date)) %>%
    filter(lvad_implant_date >= start_date & lvad_implant_date <= end_date) %>%
    filter(lvad_implant_date > CAN_LISTING_DT) %>%
    nrow()
  
  # 3. LVAD EXPLANTS DURING PERIOD
  lvad_explants <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(!is.na(explant_dt)) %>%
    filter(explant_dt >= start_date & explant_dt <= end_date) %>%
    nrow()
  
  # Total new listings
  total_new_listings <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(CAN_LISTING_DT >= start_date & CAN_LISTING_DT <= end_date) %>%
    nrow()
  
  return(data.frame(
    period_start = start_date,
    period_end = end_date,
    new_listings_with_lvad = new_listings_with_lvad,
    lvad_implants_on_waitlist = lvad_implants_on_waitlist,
    lvad_explants = lvad_explants,
    total_new_listings = total_new_listings
  ))
}

# Run flow analysis
flow_results_list <- list()
for (i in 1:length(period_starts)) {
  flow_results_list[[i]] <- get_srtr_lvad_flow(period_starts[i], period_ends[i])
}

flow_results_df <- bind_rows(flow_results_list)

flow_results_df <- flow_results_df %>%
  mutate(
    period_label = paste(format(period_start, "%b"), format(period_end, "%b %Y"), sep = "-"),
    period_factor = factor(period_label, levels = period_label),
    pct_listed_with_lvad = (new_listings_with_lvad / total_new_listings) * 100
  )

# ============================================================================
# CREATE VISUALIZATIONS
# ============================================================================

# PREVALENCE PLOTS
plot_prev_a <- ggplot(prevalence_results_df, aes(x = date_factor, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_waitlist, color = "Total Waitlist"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_waitlist, color = "Total Waitlist"), size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "LVAD Support"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "LVAD Support"), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Total Waitlist" = "steelblue", "LVAD Support" = "coral")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "SRTR: Waitlist and LVAD-Supported Candidates Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

plot_prev_b <- ggplot(prevalence_results_df, aes(x = date_factor, y = lvad_proportion)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "SRTR: Proportion of Waitlist with LVAD Support",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Percentage with LVAD (%)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15)
  )

combined_prevalence_plot <- plot_prev_a / plot_prev_b

# FLOW PLOTS
flow_plot_a <- ggplot(flow_results_df, aes(x = period_factor, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = new_listings_with_lvad, color = "Listed with LVAD"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = new_listings_with_lvad, color = "Listed with LVAD"), size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = lvad_implants_on_waitlist, color = "LVAD Implanted While Listed"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = lvad_implants_on_waitlist, color = "LVAD Implanted While Listed"), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Listed with LVAD" = "darkgreen", 
                                "LVAD Implanted While Listed" = "purple")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "SRTR: LVAD Flow Dynamics",
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


# Display plots
print(combined_prevalence_plot)
print(flow_plot_a)

# Print summaries
cat("\n=== SRTR PREVALENCE SUMMARY (Device File + Explant Censoring) ===\n")
print(prevalence_results_df %>%
        select(date, total_waitlist, total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion) %>%
        mutate(lvad_proportion = round(lvad_proportion, 2)))

cat("\n=== SRTR FLOW SUMMARY ===\n")
print(flow_results_df %>%
        select(period_label, new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist, 
               lvad_explants, total_new_listings, pct_listed_with_lvad) %>%
        mutate(pct_listed_with_lvad = round(pct_listed_with_lvad, 2)))

```




``` {r star lvad}


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# STEP 1: CREATE STAR LVAD TIMELINE
# ============================================================================

lvad_keywords <- c("heartmate", "hm", "lionheart", "arrow", "jarvik", "micromed", 
                   "debakey", "novacor", "evaheart", "worldheart", "levacor", 
                   "reliantheart", "hvad", "heartsaver")

# Get all durable LVAD devices
star_lvads <- thoracic_mcs_device_2025q2 %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, DEVICE_TYPE, LVAD_BRAND, VAD_BRAND, VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT, 
         IMPLANT_DATE, EXPLANT_DATE, INPLACE, MCS_REM_REASON) %>%
  filter(DEVICE_TYPE == "Dischargeable VAD" | 
         (DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD" & grepl(paste(lvad_keywords, collapse = "|"), 
                                        LVAD_BRAND, ignore.case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT != "Single" & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT != "Right") %>%
  # Get first implant and last explant per patient
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(IMPLANT_DATE) %>%
  summarize(
    first_lvad_implant = first(IMPLANT_DATE),
    last_explant = ifelse(all(is.na(EXPLANT_DATE)), 
                          NA_real_, 
                          max(EXPLANT_DATE, na.rm = TRUE)),
    still_inplace = any(INPLACE == "Y", na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # If still in place, set explant to NA
    lvad_explant_date = ifelse(still_inplace, NA, last_explant),
    lvad_explant_date = as.Date(lvad_explant_date, origin = "1970-01-01")
  )

cat("STAR: Total patients with durable LVAD:", nrow(star_lvads), "\n")
cat("STAR: Patients with explant:", sum(!is.na(star_lvads$lvad_explant_date)), "\n")

# ============================================================================
# PREVALENCE ANALYSIS: LVAD SUPPORT AT SPECIFIC TIMEPOINTS
# ============================================================================

dates_to_check <- c(
  mdy("10-18-2018"),
  seq(mdy("01-01-2019"), mdy("07-01-2025"), by = "2 months") - days(1)
)

get_star_lvad_prevalence <- function(check_date) {
  
  cat("Processing STAR date:", format(check_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
  
  # Get all candidates on waitlist on this date
  candidates_on_date <- thoracic_data_2025q2 %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE <= check_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(END_DATE) | END_DATE > check_date) %>%
    filter(INIT_AGE > 17) %>%
    select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE)
  
  # Join with LVAD timeline
  candidates_with_lvad <- candidates_on_date %>%
    left_join(star_lvads, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    mutate(
      has_lvad = !is.na(first_lvad_implant) & 
                 first_lvad_implant <= check_date &
                 (is.na(lvad_explant_date) | lvad_explant_date > check_date)
    )
  
  total_waitlist <- nrow(candidates_on_date)
  total_with_lvad <- sum(candidates_with_lvad$has_lvad, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(data.frame(
    date = check_date,
    total_waitlist = total_waitlist,
    total_with_lvad = total_with_lvad
  ))
}

# Run prevalence analysis
star_prevalence_list <- lapply(dates_to_check, get_star_lvad_prevalence)
star_prevalence_df <- bind_rows(star_prevalence_list)

star_prevalence_df <- star_prevalence_df %>%
  mutate(
    lvad_proportion = total_with_lvad / total_waitlist * 100,
    date_label = format(date, "%b %d, %Y"),
    date_factor = factor(date_label, levels = date_label)
  )

# ============================================================================
# FLOW ANALYSIS: 2-MONTH PERIODS
# ============================================================================

period_starts <- seq(mdy("01-01-2019"), mdy("06-01-2025"), by = "2 months")
period_ends <- period_starts %m+% months(2) - days(1)

get_star_lvad_flow <- function(start_date, end_date) {
  
  cat("Processing STAR period:", format(start_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "to", 
      format(end_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
  
  # Get all candidates on waitlist during this period
  candidates_in_period <- thoracic_data_2025q2 %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE <= end_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(END_DATE) | END_DATE > start_date) %>%
    filter(INIT_AGE > 17) %>%
    select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE)
  
  # Join with LVAD info
  candidates_with_lvad <- candidates_in_period %>%
    left_join(star_lvads, by = "WL_ID_CODE")
  
  # 1. NEW LISTINGS WITH LVAD (listed during period, already had LVAD at listing)
  new_listings_with_lvad <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE >= start_date & INIT_DATE <= end_date) %>%
    filter(!is.na(first_lvad_implant) & first_lvad_implant <= INIT_DATE) %>%
    nrow()
  
  # 2. LVAD IMPLANTS WHILE ON WAITLIST (got LVAD during period, already on waitlist)
  lvad_implants_on_waitlist <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(!is.na(first_lvad_implant)) %>%
    filter(first_lvad_implant >= start_date & first_lvad_implant <= end_date) %>%
    filter(first_lvad_implant > INIT_DATE) %>%
    nrow()
  
  # 3. LVAD EXPLANTS DURING PERIOD
  lvad_explants <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(!is.na(lvad_explant_date)) %>%
    filter(lvad_explant_date >= start_date & lvad_explant_date <= end_date) %>%
    nrow()
  
  # Total new listings
  total_new_listings <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE >= start_date & INIT_DATE <= end_date) %>%
    nrow()
  
  return(data.frame(
    period_start = start_date,
    period_end = end_date,
    new_listings_with_lvad = new_listings_with_lvad,
    lvad_implants_on_waitlist = lvad_implants_on_waitlist,
    lvad_explants = lvad_explants,
    total_new_listings = total_new_listings
  ))
}

# Run flow analysis
star_flow_list <- list()
for (i in 1:length(period_starts)) {
  star_flow_list[[i]] <- get_star_lvad_flow(period_starts[i], period_ends[i])
}

star_flow_df <- bind_rows(star_flow_list)

star_flow_df <- star_flow_df %>%
  mutate(
    period_label = paste(format(period_start, "%b"), format(period_end, "%b %Y"), sep = "-"),
    period_factor = factor(period_label, levels = period_label),
    pct_listed_with_lvad = (new_listings_with_lvad / total_new_listings) * 100
  )

# ============================================================================
# CREATE VISUALIZATIONS
# ============================================================================

# PREVALENCE PLOTS
star_plot_prev_a <- ggplot(star_prevalence_df, aes(x = date_factor, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_waitlist, color = "Total Waitlist"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_waitlist, color = "Total Waitlist"), size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "LVAD Support"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "LVAD Support"), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Total Waitlist" = "steelblue", "LVAD Support" = "coral")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "STAR: Waitlist and LVAD-Supported Candidates Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

star_plot_prev_b <- ggplot(star_prevalence_df, aes(x = date_factor, y = lvad_proportion)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "STAR: Proportion of Waitlist with LVAD Support",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Percentage with LVAD (%)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15)
  )

star_combined_prevalence <- star_plot_prev_a / star_plot_prev_b

# FLOW PLOTS
star_flow_plot_a <- ggplot(star_flow_df, aes(x = period_factor, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = new_listings_with_lvad, color = "Listed with LVAD"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = new_listings_with_lvad, color = "Listed with LVAD"), size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = lvad_implants_on_waitlist, color = "LVAD Implanted While Listed"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = lvad_implants_on_waitlist, color = "LVAD Implanted While Listed"), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Listed with LVAD" = "darkgreen", 
                                "LVAD Implanted While Listed" = "purple")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "STAR: LVAD Flow Dynamics",
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


srtr_star_combined_incidence <- flow_plot_a / star_flow_plot_a



# Summaries
cat("\n=== STAR PREVALENCE SUMMARY ===\n")
print(star_prevalence_df %>%
        select(date, total_waitlist, total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion) %>%
        mutate(lvad_proportion = round(lvad_proportion, 2)))

cat("\n=== STAR FLOW SUMMARY ===\n")
print(star_flow_df %>%
        select(period_label, new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist, 
               lvad_explants, total_new_listings, pct_listed_with_lvad) %>%
        mutate(pct_listed_with_lvad = round(pct_listed_with_lvad, 2)))



```




``` {r combined}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE SRTR AND STAR PREVALENCE DATA
# ============================================================================

# Prepare SRTR prevalence (assuming you have prevalence_results_df from SRTR code)
srtr_prev_comparison <- prevalence_results_df %>%
  select(date, total_waitlist, total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion, date_label) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "SRTR")

# Prepare STAR prevalence
star_prev_comparison <- star_prevalence_df %>%
  select(date, total_waitlist, total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion, date_label) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "STAR")

# Combine
combined_prevalence <- bind_rows(srtr_prev_comparison, star_prev_comparison) %>%
  mutate(
    date_factor = factor(date_label, levels = unique(date_label)),
    data_source = factor(data_source, levels = c("SRTR", "STAR"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# CREATE COMBINED PREVALENCE COMPARISON PLOTS
# ============================================================================

# Plot 1: Absolute LVAD counts
prev_comparison_lvad <- ggplot(combined_prevalence, aes(x = date_factor, group = data_source)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = data_source, linetype = data_source), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = data_source, shape = data_source), 
             size = 2.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "STAR" = "steelblue")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("SRTR" = "solid", "STAR" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("SRTR" = 16, "STAR" = 17)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    #title = "LVAD-Supported Candidates: SRTR vs STAR",
    #subtitle = "STAR systematically underreports LVAD prevalence",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates\nwith LVADs",
    color = "Data Source",
    linetype = "Data Source",
    shape = "Data Source"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

# Plot 2: Proportion side-by-side bars
prev_comparison_proportion <- ggplot(combined_prevalence, 
                                     aes(x = date_factor, y = lvad_proportion, fill = data_source)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "STAR" = "steelblue")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    #title = "Proportion of Waitlist with LVAD Support",
    x = "Date",
    y = "% of Waitlist\nwith LVADs",
    fill = "Data Source"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

# Combine plots
combined_prev_comparison_plot <- (prev_comparison_lvad + ggtitle("A")) / 
  (prev_comparison_proportion + ggtitle("B")) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0)
  )

print(combined_prev_comparison_plot)

# ============================================================================
# CALCULATE DISCREPANCY STATISTICS
# ============================================================================

prevalence_discrepancy <- combined_prevalence %>%
  select(date, date_label, data_source, total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = data_source,
    values_from = c(total_with_lvad, lvad_proportion)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    absolute_missing = total_with_lvad_SRTR - total_with_lvad_STAR,
    pct_missing = (absolute_missing / total_with_lvad_SRTR) * 100,
    proportion_gap = lvad_proportion_SRTR - lvad_proportion_STAR
  )

cat("\n=== PREVALENCE UNDERREPORTING IN STAR ===\n")
cat("\nOverall statistics:\n")
cat("Mean LVAD patients missing in STAR:", round(mean(prevalence_discrepancy$absolute_missing, na.rm = TRUE), 0), "\n")
cat("Mean % underreported:", round(mean(prevalence_discrepancy$pct_missing, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "%\n")
cat("Median % underreported:", round(median(prevalence_discrepancy$pct_missing, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "%\n")


```

``` {r flow combined_cohort}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE SRTR AND STAR FLOW DATA
# ============================================================================

# Prepare SRTR flow data
srtr_flow_comparison <- flow_results_df %>%
  select(period_label, period_factor, new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "SRTR")

# Prepare STAR flow data
star_flow_comparison <- star_flow_df %>%
  select(period_label, period_factor, new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist) %>%
  mutate(data_source = "STAR")

# Combine
combined_flow <- bind_rows(srtr_flow_comparison, star_flow_comparison) %>%
  mutate(data_source = factor(data_source, levels = c("SRTR", "STAR")))

# ============================================================================
# CREATE COMBINED FLOW PLOT
# ============================================================================

combined_flow_plot <- ggplot(combined_flow, aes(x = period_factor, group = interaction(data_source))) +
  # Listed with LVAD
  geom_line(aes(y = new_listings_with_lvad, color = data_source, linetype = "Listed with LVAD"), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = new_listings_with_lvad, color = data_source, shape = data_source), 
             size = 2.5) +
  # LVAD Implanted While Listed
  geom_line(aes(y = lvad_implants_on_waitlist, color = data_source, linetype = "LVAD Implanted While Listed"), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = lvad_implants_on_waitlist, color = data_source, shape = data_source), 
             size = 2.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "STAR" = "steelblue"),
                     name = "Data Source") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Listed with LVAD" = "solid", 
                                   "LVAD Implanted While Listed" = "dashed"),
                        name = "Event Type") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("SRTR" = 16, "STAR" = 17),
                     name = "Data Source") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    #title = "LVAD Flow Dynamics: SRTR vs STAR",
    #subtitle = "STAR systematically underreports 'Listed with LVAD'",
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "Number of Candidates"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

print(combined_flow_plot)

# ============================================================================
# CALCULATE FLOW DISCREPANCY STATISTICS
# ============================================================================

flow_discrepancy <- combined_flow %>%
  select(period_label, data_source, new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = data_source,
    values_from = c(new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    listed_missing = new_listings_with_lvad_SRTR - new_listings_with_lvad_STAR,
    listed_pct_missing = (listed_missing / new_listings_with_lvad_SRTR) * 100,
    implanted_diff = lvad_implants_on_waitlist_SRTR - lvad_implants_on_waitlist_STAR
  )

cat("\n=== FLOW UNDERREPORTING IN STAR ===\n")
cat("\nListed with LVAD:\n")
cat("Mean missing in STAR:", round(mean(flow_discrepancy$listed_missing, na.rm = TRUE), 0), "\n")
cat("Mean % underreported:", round(mean(flow_discrepancy$listed_pct_missing, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "%\n")

cat("\nLVAD Implanted While Listed:\n")
cat("Mean difference:", round(mean(flow_discrepancy$implanted_diff, na.rm = TRUE), 0), "\n")


```




``` {r outcomes}

library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(survival)
library(ggsurvfit)

# ============================================================================
# DEFINE LVAD COHORTS FROM DEVICE FILES
# ============================================================================

lvad_keywords <- c("heartmate", "hm", "lionheart", "arrow", "jarvik", "micromed", 
                   "debakey", "novacor", "evaheart", "worldheart", "levacor", 
                   "reliantheart", "hvad", "heartsaver")

# ============================================================================
# SRTR COHORT
# ============================================================================

# Get LVAD implants in study period
srtr_lvad_devices <- thor_support_device %>%
  filter(VadBrandId %in% c('202', '205', '206', '207', '208', '209', '210', '212', 
                           '213', '214', '223', '224', '233', '236', '239', '240', 
                           '312', '313', '314', '315', '316', '319', '322', '327', 
                           '330', '333', '334') | 
           (VadBrandId == 999 & grepl(paste(lvad_keywords, collapse = "|"), 
                                      OtherSpecify, ignore.case = TRUE))) %>%
  group_by(PX_ID) %>%
  arrange(ImplantDt) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(PX_ID, lvad_implant_date = ImplantDt) %>%
  filter(lvad_implant_date >= mdy("10-18-2018") & 
           lvad_implant_date <= mdy("12-31-2024"))

cat("SRTR LVAD implants in study period:", nrow(srtr_lvad_devices), "\n")

# Get status history to identify explants (Status 5/6 with no return to Status 1-4)
status_history <- stathist_thor2025q2 %>%
  select(PX_ID, CANHX_BEGIN_DT, CANHX_END_DT, CANHX_STAT_CD) %>%
  mutate(
    status_numeric = case_when(
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1110, 2110) ~ 1,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1120, 2120) ~ 2,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1130, 2130) ~ 3,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1140, 2140) ~ 4,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1150, 2150) ~ 5,
      CANHX_STAT_CD %in% c(1160, 2160) ~ 6,
      TRUE ~ 99
    )
  ) %>%
  inner_join(srtr_lvad_devices, by = "PX_ID") %>%
  filter(CANHX_BEGIN_DT >= lvad_implant_date) %>%
  arrange(PX_ID, CANHX_BEGIN_DT)

# Identify presumed explants: Status 5/6 with no return to Status 1-4
first_status56 <- status_history %>%
  filter(status_numeric %in% c(5, 6)) %>%
  group_by(PX_ID) %>%
  arrange(CANHX_BEGIN_DT) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(PX_ID, first_56_date = CANHX_BEGIN_DT)

returned_to_active <- status_history %>%
  inner_join(first_status56, by = "PX_ID") %>%
  filter(status_numeric %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4) & CANHX_BEGIN_DT > first_56_date) %>%
  distinct(PX_ID)

srtr_explant_dates <- first_status56 %>%
  filter(!PX_ID %in% returned_to_active$PX_ID) %>%
  select(PX_ID, explant_date = first_56_date)

cat("SRTR patients with presumed explant:", nrow(srtr_explant_dates), "\n")

# Build outcomes cohort
srtr_lvad_outcomes <- srtr_lvad_devices %>%
  inner_join(
    cand_thor2025q2 %>% 
      select(PX_ID, CAN_LISTING_DT, CAN_REM_DT, CAN_REM_CD, CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING,
             CAN_LAST_ACT_STAT_DT, CAN_LAST_INACT_STAT_DT),
    by = "PX_ID"
  ) %>%
  left_join(srtr_explant_dates, by = "PX_ID") %>%
  filter(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12 > 17) %>%
  mutate(
    # First determine removal/censoring date
    removal_or_censor_date = case_when(
      !is.na(CAN_REM_DT) ~ as.Date(CAN_REM_DT),
      TRUE ~ pmax(as.Date(CAN_LAST_ACT_STAT_DT), 
                  as.Date(CAN_LAST_INACT_STAT_DT), 
                  na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    removal_or_censor_date = if_else(is.na(removal_or_censor_date), 
                                     as.Date("2025-06-30"), 
                                     removal_or_censor_date),
    
    # Use explant date if it occurred before removal/censoring
    end_date = case_when(
      !is.na(explant_date) & explant_date < removal_or_censor_date ~ explant_date,
      TRUE ~ removal_or_censor_date
    ),
    
    followup_time = as.numeric(difftime(end_date, lvad_implant_date, units = "days")) / 365.25,
    
    # Event coding: prioritize explantation if it occurred
    event = case_when(
      !is.na(explant_date) & explant_date < removal_or_censor_date ~ 3,  # Explanted
      CAN_REM_CD %in% c(8, 13) ~ 1,  # Death/Deterioration
      CAN_REM_CD == 4 ~ 2,  # Transplant
      TRUE ~ 0  # Censored
    ),
    event_factor = factor(event, levels = c(0, 1, 2, 3),
                          labels = c("Censored", "Death/Deterioration", "Transplant", "Explanted")),
    data_source = "SRTR"
  ) %>%
  filter(followup_time >= 0)

cat("SRTR cohort:", nrow(srtr_lvad_outcomes), "patients\n")
cat("  Deaths/Deterioration:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 1), "\n")
cat("  Transplants:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 2), "\n")
cat("  Explanted:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 3), "\n")
cat("  Censored:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 0), "\n")

# ============================================================================
# STAR COHORT
# ============================================================================

star_lvad_devices <- thoracic_mcs_device_2025q2 %>%
  filter(DEVICE_TYPE == "Dischargeable VAD" | 
           (DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD" & grepl(paste(lvad_keywords, collapse = "|"), 
                                          LVAD_BRAND, ignore.case = TRUE))) %>%
  filter(VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT != "Single" & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT != "Right") %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(IMPLANT_DATE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, lvad_implant_date = IMPLANT_DATE, explant_date = EXPLANT_DATE) %>%
  mutate(
    lvad_implant_date = as.Date(lvad_implant_date, origin = "1970-01-01"),
    explant_date = as.Date(explant_date, origin = "1970-01-01")
  ) %>%
  filter(lvad_implant_date >= mdy("10-18-2018") & 
           lvad_implant_date <= mdy("12-31-2024"))

cat("\nOPTN STAR LVAD implants in study period:", nrow(star_lvad_devices), "\n")

star_lvad_outcomes <- star_lvad_devices %>%
  inner_join(
    thoracic_data_2025q2 %>% 
      select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE, REM_CD, INIT_AGE),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  filter(INIT_AGE > 17) %>%
  mutate(
    removal_or_censor_date = if_else(is.na(END_DATE), 
                                     as.Date("2025-06-30"), 
                                     as.Date(END_DATE)),
    
    # Use explant date if it occurred before removal/censoring
    end_date = case_when(
      !is.na(explant_date) & explant_date < removal_or_censor_date ~ explant_date,
      TRUE ~ removal_or_censor_date
    ),
    
    followup_time = as.numeric(difftime(end_date, lvad_implant_date, units = "days")) / 365.25,
    
    # Event coding: prioritize explantation if it occurred
    event = case_when(
      !is.na(explant_date) & explant_date < removal_or_censor_date ~ 3,  # Explanted
      REM_CD %in% c(8, 13) ~ 1,  # Death/Deterioration
      REM_CD == 4 ~ 2,  # Transplant
      TRUE ~ 0  # Censored
    ),
    event_factor = factor(event, levels = c(0, 1, 2, 3),
                          labels = c("Censored", "Death/Deterioration", "Transplant", "Explanted")),
    data_source = "OPTN STAR"
  ) %>%
  filter(followup_time > 0)

cat("OPTN STAR cohort:", nrow(star_lvad_outcomes), "patients\n")
cat("  Deaths/Deterioration:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 1), "\n")
cat("  Transplants:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 2), "\n")
cat("  Explanted:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 3), "\n")
cat("  Censored:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 0), "\n")

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE AND ANALYZE - INCLUDE EXPLANTATION AS COMPETING RISK
# ============================================================================

combined_cohort <- bind_rows(
  srtr_lvad_outcomes %>% select(followup_time, event_factor, data_source),
  star_lvad_outcomes %>% select(followup_time, event_factor, data_source)
) %>%
  mutate(data_source = factor(data_source, levels = c("SRTR", "OPTN STAR")))

cat("\nCombined cohort:", nrow(combined_cohort), "patients\n")

# Competing risks analysis - INCLUDE ALL THREE COMPETING RISKS
cif_fit <- cuminc(Surv(followup_time, event_factor) ~ data_source, 
                  data = combined_cohort)

# Fine-Gray tests for each outcome
fg_transplant <- crr(Surv(followup_time, event_factor) ~ data_source,
                     data = combined_cohort,
                     failcode = "Transplant")

fg_death <- crr(Surv(followup_time, event_factor) ~ data_source,
                data = combined_cohort,
                failcode = "Death/Deterioration")

fg_explant <- crr(Surv(followup_time, event_factor) ~ data_source,
                  data = combined_cohort,
                  failcode = "Explanted")

p_transplant <- tidy(fg_transplant)$p.value[1]
p_death <- tidy(fg_death)$p.value[1]
p_explant <- tidy(fg_explant)$p.value[1]

cat("\n=== FINE-GRAY TESTS ===\n")
cat("Transplant p-value:", format.pval(p_transplant, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("Death/Deterioration p-value:", format.pval(p_death, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("Explantation p-value:", format.pval(p_explant, digits = 3), "\n")

# Plot only transplant and death/deterioration with Fine-Gray p-values annotated
cif_plot <- cif_fit %>%
  ggcuminc(
    outcome = c("Death/Deterioration", "Transplant"),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) + 
  add_confidence_interval(alpha = 0.2) +
  add_risktable(
    size = 5, 
    theme = theme_risktable_default(
      plot.title.size = 14, 
      axis.text.y.size = 14
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:6, limits = c(0, 6)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = scales::percent,
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  xlab("Years from LVAD Implantation") +
  ylab("Cumulative Incidence") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "OPTN STAR" = "steelblue"),
    name = "Data Source"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "OPTN STAR" = "steelblue"),
    name = "Data Source"
  ) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "Outcome") +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1, nrow = 1),
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1, nrow = 1),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 1)
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 5.5, y = 0.95, 
           label = paste0("Fine-Gray Transplant: ", 
                          ifelse(p_transplant < 0.001, "p<0.001", 
                                 paste0("p=", format.pval(p_transplant, digits = 3)))),
           hjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 5.5, y = 0.90,
           label = paste0("Fine-Gray Death/Deterioration: ", 
                          ifelse(p_death < 0.001, "p<0.001", 
                                 paste0("p=", format.pval(p_death, digits = 3)))),
           hjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

print(cif_plot)



# Summary stats
cat("\n=== MEDIAN FOLLOW-UP ===\n")
cat("SRTR:", round(median(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")
cat("STAR:", round(median(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")

# Cumulative incidence at key timepoints
cif_summary <- cif_fit %>%
  tidy() %>%
  filter(time <= 3.5) %>%
  group_by(outcome, strata) %>%
  filter(abs(time - 1) == min(abs(time - 1)) | 
           abs(time - 2) == min(abs(time - 2)) |
           abs(time - 3) == min(abs(time - 3))) %>%
  distinct(outcome, strata, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(outcome, strata, time) %>%
  mutate(
    time_year = round(time, 1),
    estimate_pct = round(estimate * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, strata, time_year, estimate_pct)

cat("\n=== CUMULATIVE INCIDENCE AT 1, 2, 3 YEARS ===\n")
print(cif_summary)



```



``` {r summary}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)

# ============================================================================
# EXTRACT CUMULATIVE INCIDENCE AT KEY TIMEPOINTS WITH CONFIDENCE INTERVALS
# ============================================================================

# Get all CIF estimates
cif_all <- cif_fit %>%
  tidy()

# Timepoints to extract
timepoints <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)

# Extract CIF at each timepoint for each outcome and strata
cif_list <- list()
counter <- 1

for (outcome_val in c("Transplant", "Death/Deterioration")) {
  for (strata_val in c("SRTR", "OPTN STAR")) {
    for (time_val in timepoints) {
      
      # Get closest CIF estimate to target time
      closest <- cif_all %>%
        filter(outcome == outcome_val, strata == strata_val) %>%
        mutate(time_diff = abs(time - time_val)) %>%
        slice_min(time_diff, n = 1) %>%
        slice(1)  # Take only first if tied
      
      if (nrow(closest) > 0) {
        cif_list[[counter]] <- data.frame(
          outcome = outcome_val,
          strata = strata_val,
          target_time = time_val,
          actual_time = closest$time[1],
          estimate_pct = closest$estimate[1] * 100,
          conf_low_pct = closest$conf.low[1] * 100,
          conf_high_pct = closest$conf.high[1] * 100
        )
        counter <- counter + 1
      }
    }
  }
}

# Combine all results and ensure uniqueness
cif_summary_table <- bind_rows(cif_list) %>%
  distinct(outcome, strata, target_time, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Create formatted estimate with CI
cif_summary_formatted <- cif_summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    estimate_ci = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f-%.1f)", estimate_pct, conf_low_pct, conf_high_pct),
    outcome_strata = paste(outcome, strata, sep = "_")
  )

# Reshape for display - with confidence intervals
cif_summary_wide_ci <- cif_summary_formatted %>%
  select(target_time, outcome_strata, estimate_ci) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = outcome_strata,
    values_from = estimate_ci
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Years` = target_time,
    `SRTR Transplant` = `Transplant_SRTR`,
    `STAR Transplant` = `Transplant_OPTN STAR`,
    `SRTR Death/Deterioration` = `Death/Deterioration_SRTR`,
    `STAR Death/Deterioration` = `Death/Deterioration_OPTN STAR`
  )

# Point estimate table with differences
cif_summary_wide <- cif_summary_table %>%
  select(target_time, outcome, strata, estimate_pct) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(outcome, strata),
    values_from = estimate_pct,
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Years` = target_time,
    `SRTR_Transplant` = `Transplant_SRTR`,
    `STAR_Transplant` = `Transplant_OPTN STAR`,
    `SRTR_Death` = `Death/Deterioration_SRTR`,
    `STAR_Death` = `Death/Deterioration_OPTN STAR`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Transplant Difference` = `STAR_Transplant` - `SRTR_Transplant`,
    `Death Difference` = `STAR_Death` - `SRTR_Death`
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !Years, ~round(., 1))) %>%
  rename(
    `SRTR Transplant (%)` = `SRTR_Transplant`,
    `STAR Transplant (%)` = `STAR_Transplant`,
    `SRTR Death (%)` = `SRTR_Death`,
    `STAR Death (%)` = `STAR_Death`
  )

cat("\n=== CUMULATIVE INCIDENCE WITH 95% CONFIDENCE INTERVALS ===\n\n")
print(cif_summary_wide_ci, n = Inf)

cat("\n\n=== FORMATTED TABLE FOR MANUSCRIPT ===\n\n")
kable(cif_summary_wide_ci, format = "simple", align = c('c', 'c', 'c', 'c', 'c'))

cat("\n\n=== POINT ESTIMATES WITH DIFFERENCES ===\n\n")
print(cif_summary_wide, n = Inf)

# Calculate median follow-up
cat("\n\n=== FOLLOW-UP STATISTICS ===\n")
cat("SRTR:\n")
cat("  Median (IQR):", round(median(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), 
    "(", round(quantile(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.25), 2), "-", 
    round(quantile(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.75), 2), ") years\n")
cat("  Max:", round(max(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")

cat("\nSTAR:\n")
cat("  Median (IQR):", round(median(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), 
    "(", round(quantile(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.25), 2), "-", 
    round(quantile(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.75), 2), ") years\n")
cat("  Max:", round(max(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")

# Event counts
cat("\n\n=== EVENT COUNTS ===\n")
cat("\nSRTR (N=", nrow(srtr_lvad_outcomes), "):\n", sep="")
cat("  Transplants:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 2), 
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)", 100*sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 2)/nrow(srtr_lvad_outcomes)), "\n")
cat("  Deaths/Deterioration:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 1), 
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)", 100*sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 1)/nrow(srtr_lvad_outcomes)), "\n")
cat("  Censored:", sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 0), 
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)", 100*sum(srtr_lvad_outcomes$event == 0)/nrow(srtr_lvad_outcomes)), "\n")

cat("\nSTAR (N=", nrow(star_lvad_outcomes), "):\n", sep="")
cat("  Transplants:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 2), 
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)", 100*sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 2)/nrow(star_lvad_outcomes)), "\n")
cat("  Deaths/Deterioration:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 1), 
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)", 100*sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 1)/nrow(star_lvad_outcomes)), "\n")
cat("  Censored:", sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 0), 
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)", 100*sum(star_lvad_outcomes$event == 0)/nrow(star_lvad_outcomes)), "\n")







# ============================================================================
# TEST FOR SIGNIFICANT DIFFERENCE IN FOLLOW-UP
# ============================================================================

# Wilcoxon rank-sum test (non-parametric)
followup_test <- wilcox.test(
  srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time,
  star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time
)

cat("\n=== COMPARISON OF FOLLOW-UP TIMES ===\n\n")
cat("SRTR median follow-up:", round(median(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 3), "years\n")
cat("STAR median follow-up:", round(median(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 3), "years\n")
cat("Difference:", round(median(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time) - median(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")

cat("\nWilcoxon rank-sum test:\n")
cat("  W statistic:", format(followup_test$statistic, big.mark = ","), "\n")
cat("  p-value:", format.pval(followup_test$p.value, digits = 3, eps = 0.001), "\n")

data.frame(
  cohort = c("SRTR", "STAR"),
  IQR = c(IQR(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 
          IQR(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time)),
  max = c(max(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 
          max(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time))
)

data.frame(
  cohort = c("SRTR", "STAR"),
  Q1 = c(quantile(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.25),
         quantile(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.25)),
  Q3 = c(quantile(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.75),
         quantile(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time, 0.75))
)

if (followup_test$p.value < 0.001) {
  cat("  Result: STAR has SIGNIFICANTLY shorter follow-up (p<0.001)\n")
} else if (followup_test$p.value < 0.05) {
  cat("  Result: STAR has significantly shorter follow-up (p<0.05)\n")
} else {
  cat("  Result: No significant difference in follow-up\n")
}

# Effect size (Hodges-Lehmann estimator - median difference)
cat("\n=== ADDITIONAL STATISTICS ===\n")
cat("Mean follow-up:\n")
cat("  SRTR:", round(mean(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")
cat("  STAR:", round(mean(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")
cat("  Difference:", round(mean(srtr_lvad_outcomes$followup_time) - mean(star_lvad_outcomes$followup_time), 2), "years\n")



```


``` {r extra summary}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)

# ============================================================================
# COMPARE DISTRIBUTION OF LVAD IMPLANT YEARS: SRTR vs STAR
# ============================================================================

# SRTR: Extract implant year
srtr_implant_years <- srtr_lvad_outcomes %>%
  mutate(
    implant_year = year(lvad_implant_date),
    data_source = "SRTR"
  ) %>%
  count(implant_year, data_source)

# STAR: Extract implant year
star_implant_years <- star_lvad_outcomes %>%
  mutate(
    implant_year = year(lvad_implant_date),
    data_source = "STAR"
  ) %>%
  count(implant_year, data_source)

# Combine
implant_year_comparison <- bind_rows(srtr_implant_years, star_implant_years) %>%
  group_by(data_source) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    percentage = (n / total) * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Calculate absolute and percentage differences
implant_year_wide <- implant_year_comparison %>%
  select(implant_year, data_source, n, percentage) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = data_source,
    values_from = c(n, percentage),
    values_fill = list(n = 0, percentage = 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n_difference = n_SRTR - n_STAR,
    pct_difference = percentage_SRTR - percentage_STAR,
    star_capture_rate = (n_STAR / n_SRTR) * 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(implant_year)

cat("\n=== LVAD IMPLANT YEAR DISTRIBUTION ===\n\n")
print(implant_year_wide, n = Inf)

# ============================================================================
# VISUALIZATION: Side-by-side bars
# ============================================================================

implant_year_plot <- ggplot(implant_year_comparison, 
                            aes(x = factor(implant_year), y = percentage, fill = data_source)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "STAR" = "steelblue"),
                    name = "Data Source") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of LVAD Implant Years: SRTR vs STAR",
    subtitle = "STAR systematically underrepresents recent implants",
    x = "Year of LVAD Implantation",
    y = "Percentage of Cohort (%)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

print(implant_year_plot)

# ============================================================================
# CAPTURE RATE OVER TIME
# ============================================================================


# Chi-square test for difference in distributions
contingency_table <- implant_year_comparison %>%
  select(implant_year, data_source, n) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = data_source, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  select(SRTR, STAR) %>%
  as.matrix()

chi_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)

cat("\n\n=== CHI-SQUARE TEST FOR DISTRIBUTION DIFFERENCE ===\n")
cat("X-squared:", round(chi_test$statistic, 2), "\n")
cat("p-value:", format.pval(chi_test$p.value, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("Result: Distributions are", ifelse(chi_test$p.value < 0.001, "SIGNIFICANTLY", "significantly"), 
    "different (p<0.001)\n")




```


``` {r extra stuff}

# ============================================================================
# YEAR-BY-YEAR PROPORTION TESTS
# ============================================================================

# For each year, test if SRTR proportion ≠ STAR proportion
year_by_year_tests <- implant_year_wide %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # Two-proportion z-test
    prop_test = list(prop.test(
      x = c(n_SRTR, n_STAR),
      n = c(sum(implant_year_wide$n_SRTR), sum(implant_year_wide$n_STAR)),
      correct = FALSE
    )),
    p_value = prop_test$p.value,
    significant = p_value < 0.05
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(implant_year, n_SRTR, n_STAR, percentage_SRTR, percentage_STAR, 
         pct_difference, p_value, significant) %>%
  mutate(
    p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "p<0.001", sprintf("p=%.3f", p_value)),
    sig_marker = ifelse(significant, "*", "")
  )

cat("\n=== YEAR-BY-YEAR PROPORTION TESTS ===\n\n")
print(year_by_year_tests %>% select(implant_year, percentage_SRTR, percentage_STAR, 
                                     pct_difference, p_formatted, sig_marker), 
      n = Inf)

# Add significance markers to the plot
implant_year_plot_with_sig <- implant_year_comparison %>%
  left_join(
    year_by_year_tests %>% select(implant_year, p_value, sig_marker),
    by = "implant_year"
  ) %>%
  group_by(implant_year) %>%
  mutate(max_pct = max(percentage)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(implant_year), y = percentage, fill = data_source)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    data = . %>% filter(data_source == "SRTR"),
    aes(x = factor(implant_year), y = max_pct + 2, label = sig_marker),
    size = 6, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("SRTR" = "coral", "STAR" = "steelblue"),
                    name = "Data Source") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  labs(
    #title = "Distribution of LVAD Implant Years: SRTR vs STAR",
    #subtitle = "STAR systematically underrepresents recent implants (* = p<0.05)",
    x = "Year of LVAD Implantation",
    y = "Percentage of Cohort (%)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )

print(implant_year_plot_with_sig)


# Chi-square test for difference in distributions
contingency_table <- implant_year_comparison %>%
  select(implant_year, data_source, n) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = data_source, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  select(SRTR, STAR) %>%
  as.matrix()

chi_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)

cat("\n\n=== CHI-SQUARE TEST FOR DISTRIBUTION DIFFERENCE ===\n")
cat("X-squared:", round(chi_test$statistic, 2), "\n")
cat("p-value:", format.pval(chi_test$p.value, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("Result: Distributions are", ifelse(chi_test$p.value < 0.001, "SIGNIFICANTLY", "significantly"), 
    "different (p<0.001)\n")






```



``` {r fortable 1}

library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(labelled)

# Define LVAD keywords
lvad_keywords <- c("heartmate", "hm", "lionheart", "arrow", "jarvik", "micromed", 
                   "debakey", "novacor", "evaheart", "worldheart", "levacor", 
                   "reliantheart", "hvad", "heartsaver")

# ============================================================================
# PREPARE SRTR TABLE 1 DATA
# ============================================================================

srtr_table1 <- srtr_lvad_outcomes %>%
  select(PX_ID, lvad_implant_date) %>%
  left_join(
    cand_thor2025q2 %>%
      select(PX_ID, CAN_GENDER, CAN_RACE, CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR, 
             CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING, CAN_BMI, CAN_ABO, 
             CAN_DGN, CAN_PRIMARY_PAY, CAN_LISTING_DT),
    by = "PX_ID"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    thor_support_device %>%
      filter(VadBrandId %in% c('202', '205', '206', '207', '208', '209', '210', '212', 
                               '213', '214', '223', '224', '233', '236', '239', '240', 
                               '312', '313', '314', '315', '316', '319', '322', '327', 
                               '330', '333', '334')) %>%
      group_by(PX_ID) %>%
      arrange(ImplantDt) %>%
      slice(1) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(PX_ID, VadBrandId),
    by = "PX_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = "SRTR",
    age_at_listing = floor(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12),
    age_at_lvad = floor(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12) + 
      as.numeric(difftime(lvad_implant_date, CAN_LISTING_DT, units = "days")) / 365.25,
    age_at_lvad = floor(age_at_lvad),
    sex = ifelse(CAN_GENDER == "M", "Male", "Female"),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    race = case_when(
      is.na(CAN_RACE) & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "LATINO" ~ "Hispanic/Latino",
      CAN_RACE == 8 & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "NLATIN" ~ "White",
      CAN_RACE == 16 & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "NLATIN" ~ "Black",
      CAN_RACE == 64 & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "NLATIN" ~ "Asian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    race = factor(race, levels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic/Latino", "Asian", "Other")),
    bmi_categories = case_when(
      CAN_BMI < 18 ~ "Underweight",
      CAN_BMI >= 18 & CAN_BMI < 25 ~ "Normal",
      CAN_BMI >= 25 & CAN_BMI < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      CAN_BMI >= 30 ~ "Obese",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"),
    bmi_categories = factor(bmi_categories, levels = c("Normal", "Underweight", "Overweight", "Obese", "Unknown")),
    blood_type = factor(
      case_when(
        CAN_ABO %in% c("A", "A1", "A2") ~ "A",
        CAN_ABO %in% c("A1B", "A2B") ~ "AB",
        TRUE ~ CAN_ABO)),
    diagnosis = case_when(
      CAN_DGN > 999 & CAN_DGN < 1007 ~ "Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic",
      CAN_DGN == 1007 | CAN_DGN == 1200 ~ "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy",
      CAN_DGN > 1048 & CAN_DGN < 1100 ~ "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      CAN_DGN == 1203 | (CAN_DGN >= 1205 & CAN_DGN <= 1207) ~ "Congenital Heart Disease",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    diagnosis = factor(diagnosis, levels = c("Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic", "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy", 
                                             "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy", "Congenital Heart Disease", "Other")),
    payor = case_when(
      CAN_PRIMARY_PAY %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 13) ~ "Public",
      CAN_PRIMARY_PAY == 1 ~ "Private",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    payor = factor(payor, levels = c("Private", "Public", "Other")),
    lvad_type = case_when(
      VadBrandId %in% c('236', '330') ~ "HeartMate 3",
      VadBrandId %in% c('205', '313') ~ "HeartMate II",
      VadBrandId %in% c('224', '316') ~ "HVAD",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    lvad_type = factor(lvad_type, levels = c("HeartMate 3", "HeartMate II", "HVAD", "Other"))
  )

cat("SRTR Table 1 data prepared:", nrow(srtr_table1), "patients\n")

# ============================================================================
# PREPARE STAR TABLE 1 DATA
# ============================================================================

star_table1 <- star_lvad_outcomes %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, lvad_implant_date) %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_data_2025q2 %>%
      select(WL_ID_CODE, GENDER, ETHCAT, INIT_AGE, INIT_WGT_KG_CALC, 
             INIT_HGT_CM_CALC, ABO, TCR_DGN, PRI_PAYMENT_TCR, INIT_DATE),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_mcs_device_2025q2 %>%
      filter(DEVICE_TYPE == "Dischargeable VAD" | 
               (DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD" & grepl(paste(lvad_keywords, collapse = "|"), 
                                              LVAD_BRAND, ignore.case = TRUE))) %>%
      filter(VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT != "Single" & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT != "Right") %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      arrange(IMPLANT_DATE) %>%
      slice(1) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(WL_ID_CODE, LVAD_BRAND, VAD_BRAND, DEVICE_TYPE),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = "STAR",
    age_at_listing = floor(INIT_AGE),
    age_at_lvad = INIT_AGE + as.numeric(difftime(lvad_implant_date, INIT_DATE, units = "days")) / 365.25,
    age_at_lvad = floor(age_at_lvad),
    sex = ifelse(GENDER == "M", "Male", "Female"),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    race = case_when(
      ETHCAT == 1 ~ "White",
      ETHCAT == 2 ~ "Black",
      ETHCAT == 4 ~ "Hispanic/Latino",
      ETHCAT == 5 ~ "Asian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    race = factor(race, levels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic/Latino", "Asian", "Other")),
    bmi = INIT_WGT_KG_CALC / ((INIT_HGT_CM_CALC / 100) * (INIT_HGT_CM_CALC / 100)),
    bmi_categories = case_when(
      bmi < 18 ~ "Underweight",
      bmi >= 18 & bmi < 25 ~ "Normal",
      bmi >= 25 & bmi < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      bmi >= 30 ~ "Obese",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"),
    bmi_categories = factor(bmi_categories, levels = c("Normal", "Underweight", "Overweight", "Obese", "Unknown")),
    blood_type = factor(
      case_when(
        ABO %in% c("A", "A1", "A2") ~ "A",
        ABO %in% c("A1B", "A2B") ~ "AB",
        TRUE ~ ABO)),
    diagnosis = case_when(
      TCR_DGN > 999 & TCR_DGN < 1007 ~ "Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic",
      TCR_DGN == 1007 | TCR_DGN == 1200 ~ "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN > 1048 & TCR_DGN < 1100 ~ "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN == 1203 | (TCR_DGN >= 1205 & TCR_DGN <= 1207) ~ "Congenital Heart Disease",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    diagnosis = factor(diagnosis, levels = c("Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic", "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy", 
                                             "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy", "Congenital Heart Disease", "Other")),
    payor = case_when(
      PRI_PAYMENT_TCR == 1 ~ "Private",
      PRI_PAYMENT_TCR %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 13) ~ "Public",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    payor = factor(payor, levels = c("Private", "Public", "Other")),
    device_brand = if_else(DEVICE_TYPE == "Dischargeable VAD", VAD_BRAND, LVAD_BRAND),
    lvad_type = case_when(
      grepl("HeartMate 3|HM3|HM 3|HeartMate III", device_brand, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HeartMate 3",
      grepl("HeartMate II|HMII|HM II|HM2|HM 2", device_brand, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HeartMate II",
      grepl("HVAD|HeartWare", device_brand, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HVAD",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    lvad_type = factor(lvad_type, levels = c("HeartMate 3", "HeartMate II", "HVAD", "Other"))
  )

cat("STAR Table 1 data prepared:", nrow(star_table1), "patients\n")

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE AND CREATE TABLE 1
# ============================================================================

combined_table1 <- bind_rows(
  srtr_table1 %>% select(data_source, age_at_listing, age_at_lvad, sex, race, bmi_categories, 
                         blood_type, diagnosis, payor, lvad_type),
  star_table1 %>% select(data_source, age_at_listing, age_at_lvad, sex, race, bmi_categories, 
                         blood_type, diagnosis, payor, lvad_type)
) %>%
  mutate(data_source = factor(data_source, levels = c("SRTR", "STAR")))

# Set variable labels
var_label_list <- list(
  age_at_listing = "Age at Listing (Years)",
  age_at_lvad = "Age at LVAD Implant (Years)",
  sex = "Sex",
  race = "Race/Ethnicity",
  bmi_categories = "BMI Category",
  blood_type = "Blood Type",
  diagnosis = "Primary Diagnosis",
  payor = "Insurance Type",
  lvad_type = "LVAD Device Type"
)

labelled::var_label(combined_table1) <- var_label_list

# Create table
table1 <- combined_table1 %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = data_source,
    digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_p(test.args = all_tests("chisq.test") ~ list(workspace = 2e7)) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Characteristic**") %>%
  modify_caption("**Table 1. Baseline Characteristics of LVAD Cohorts by Data Source**") %>%
  bold_labels()

table1

```


``` {r status4}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)

# Define dates to check
dates_to_check <- c(
  mdy("10-18-2018"),
  seq(mdy("01-01-2019"), mdy("07-01-2025"), by = "2 months") - days(1)
)

# Prepare LVAD status 4 justification data
lvadstatus4 <- just_form_hr_stat4 %>% 
  select(PX_ID, CriteriaLvadSupport, FormEffectiveDt, FormExpirationDt, RequestedCandStatCd) %>% 
  filter(CriteriaLvadSupport == 1)

# Function to get status 4 LVAD counts at each date
get_srtr_status4_lvad <- function(check_date) {
  
  cat("Processing SRTR date:", format(check_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
  
  # Get all candidates actively listed on this date
  candidates_on_date <- cand_thor2025q2 %>%
    filter(CAN_LISTING_DT <= check_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(CAN_REM_DT) | CAN_REM_DT > check_date) %>%
    filter(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12 > 17) %>%
    select(PX_ID, CAN_LISTING_DT, CAN_REM_DT)
  
  # Merge with status history to get current status
  candidates_with_status <- candidates_on_date %>%
    left_join(stathist_thor2025q2, by = "PX_ID") %>%
    # Filter to status periods active on check_date
    filter(CANHX_BEGIN_DT <= check_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(CANHX_END_DT) | CANHX_END_DT > check_date) %>%
    # Get most recent status for each candidate
    group_by(PX_ID) %>%
    arrange(desc(CANHX_BEGIN_DT)) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Filter to status 4 candidates (status code 2140)
  status4_candidates <- candidates_with_status %>%
    filter(CANHX_STAT_CD == 2140)
  
  # Merge with LVAD justification forms to identify LVAD-supported status 4
  status4_with_lvad_justification <- status4_candidates %>%
    left_join(
      lvadstatus4,
      by = c("PX_ID", "CANHX_BEGIN_DT" = "FormEffectiveDt", "CANHX_STAT_CD" = "RequestedCandStatCd")
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(CriteriaLvadSupport))
  
  total_status4 <- nrow(status4_candidates)
  status4_with_lvad <- nrow(status4_with_lvad_justification)
  
  return(data.frame(
    date = check_date,
    total_status4 = total_status4,
    status4_with_lvad = status4_with_lvad,
    proportion = ifelse(total_status4 > 0, status4_with_lvad / total_status4 * 100, 0)
  ))
}

# Run the loop
status4_results_list <- lapply(dates_to_check, get_srtr_status4_lvad)
status4_results_df <- bind_rows(status4_results_list)

# Add formatted labels
status4_results_df <- status4_results_df %>%
  mutate(
    date_label = format(date, "%b %Y")
  )

# Print results
cat("\n=== STATUS 4 CANDIDATES WITH LVAD SUPPORT (SRTR) ===\n\n")
print(status4_results_df)

# ============================================================================
# PLOT 1: Line plot of absolute numbers
# ============================================================================

# Reshape data for plotting both lines
status4_long <- status4_results_df %>%
  select(date, date_label, total_status4, status4_with_lvad) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_status4, status4_with_lvad),
    names_to = "category",
    values_to = "count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, 
                      levels = c("total_status4", "status4_with_lvad"),
                      labels = c("Total Status 4", "Status 4 with LVAD Support"))
  )

line_plot <- ggplot(status4_long, aes(x = date, y = count, color = category, linetype = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Total Status 4" = "#0072B2", 
                                "Status 4 with LVAD Support" = "#D55E00"),
                     name = "") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Total Status 4" = "solid", 
                                   "Status 4 with LVAD Support" = "dashed"),
                        name = "") +
  labs(
    title = "Status 4 Candidates with LVAD Support Over Time (SRTR)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    caption = "Status 4 = Lowest priority for stable candidates"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)

print(line_plot)

# ============================================================================
# PLOT 2: Column plot (stacked bar chart)
# ============================================================================

# First add factor version to the dataframe if not already present
status4_results_df <- status4_results_df %>%
  mutate(
    date_label = format(date, "%b %d, %Y"),  # e.g., "Oct 18, 2018", "Jan 01, 2019"
    date_factor = factor(date_label, levels = date_label)  # Ordered factor for equidistant bars
  )

col_plot <- ggplot(status4_results_df, aes(x = date_factor)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = total_status4), fill = "#0072B2", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_col(aes(y = status4_with_lvad), fill = "#D55E00") +
  labs(
    title = "Status 4 Candidates: Total vs. LVAD-Supported (SRTR)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    caption = "Orange = LVAD-supported Status 4 | Blue = All Status 4"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9)  # Reduced size for readability
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)

print(col_plot)


# ============================================================================
# PLOT 3: Proportion over time
# ============================================================================

prop_plot <- ggplot(status4_results_df, aes(x = date, y = proportion)) +
  geom_line(color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, color = "#D55E00") +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Status 4 Candidates with LVAD Support (SRTR)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Percentage of Status 4 with LVAD (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 10))

print(prop_plot)


cat("\n=== PLOTS SAVED ===\n")
cat("Files: srtr_status4_lvad_line.png, srtr_status4_lvad_column.png, srtr_status4_lvad_proportion.png\n")











# Prepare data for legend-friendly plotting
combined_plot_data_long <- combined_plot_data %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(total_status4, status4_with_lvad, total_with_lvad),
    names_to = "category",
    values_to = "count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(category,
                      levels = c("total_with_lvad", "total_status4", "status4_with_lvad"),
                      labels = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications",
                                 "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD", 
                                 "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File"))
  )

# Create combined plot with proper legend
combined_plot <- ggplot(combined_plot_data, aes(x = date_factor)) +
  # Bars
  geom_col(aes(y = total_status4, fill = "All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_col(aes(y = status4_with_lvad, fill = "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD")) +
  # Line
  geom_line(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File", group = 1), 
            linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File"), 
             size = 2.5) +
  # Manual scales for legend
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications" = "#0072B2",
               "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD" = "#D55E00"),
    breaks = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications", "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c("All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File" = "#CC0000")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Status 4 Candidates and Overall LVAD Prevalence (SRTR)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1),
    color = guide_legend(order = 2)
  )

print(combined_plot)




_______________________________________



lvadstatus4star = thoracic_stat4_2025q2 %>% select(WL_ID_CODE, CRITERIALVADSUPPORT, FORMEFFECTIVEDT, UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD) %>% filter(CRITERIALVADSUPPORT == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    new_UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD = ifelse(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2020, 2140, UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD))

star_waitlist_hx = thoracic_wlhistory_data_2025q2 %>% select(WL_ID_CODE, CHG_TY, CHG_DATE, UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD) 


# Function to get status 4 LVAD counts at each date for STAR
get_star_status4_lvad <- function(check_date) {
  
  cat("Processing STAR date:", format(check_date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
  
  # Get all candidates actively listed on this date
  candidates_on_date <- thoracic_data_2025q2 %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE <= check_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(END_DATE) | END_DATE > check_date) %>%
    filter(INIT_AGE > 17) %>%
    select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE)
  
  # Prepare status history with constructed end dates
  status_history_with_end <- star_waitlist_hx %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    arrange(CHG_DATE) %>%
    mutate(
      # End date = next status change date
      status_end_date = lead(CHG_DATE)
      # If no next status, status_end_date = NA (still in this status)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Merge with status history to get current status
  candidates_with_status <- candidates_on_date %>%
    left_join(status_history_with_end, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    # Filter to status periods active on check_date
    filter(CHG_DATE <= check_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(status_end_date) | status_end_date > check_date) %>%
    # Get most recent status for each candidate
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    arrange(desc(CHG_DATE)) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Filter to status 4 candidates (status code 2140)
  status4_candidates <- candidates_with_status %>%
    filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2140)
  
  # Merge with LVAD justification forms to identify LVAD-supported status 4
  status4_with_lvad_justification <- status4_candidates %>%
    left_join(
      lvadstatus4star,
      by = c("WL_ID_CODE", "CHG_DATE" = "FORMEFFECTIVEDT", "UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD" = "new_UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD")
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(CRITERIALVADSUPPORT))
  
  total_status4 <- nrow(status4_candidates)
  status4_with_lvad <- nrow(status4_with_lvad_justification)
  
  return(data.frame(
    date = check_date,
    total_status4 = total_status4,
    status4_with_lvad = status4_with_lvad,
    proportion = ifelse(total_status4 > 0, status4_with_lvad / total_status4 * 100, 0)
  ))
}

# Run the loop
star_status4_results_list <- lapply(dates_to_check, get_star_status4_lvad)
star_status4_results_df <- bind_rows(star_status4_results_list)

# Add formatted labels
star_status4_results_df <- star_status4_results_df %>%
  mutate(
    date_label = format(date, "%b %d, %Y"),
    date_factor = factor(date_label, levels = date_label)
  )

# Print results
cat("\n=== STATUS 4 CANDIDATES WITH LVAD SUPPORT (STAR) ===\n\n")
print(star_status4_results_df)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE WITH STAR PREVALENCE DATA AND CREATE PLOT
# ============================================================================

# Combine status 4 data with overall LVAD prevalence data
star_combined_plot_data <- star_status4_results_df %>%
  left_join(
    star_prevalence_df %>% select(date, total_with_lvad),
    by = "date"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    date_label = format(date, "%b %d, %Y"),
    date_factor = factor(date_label, levels = date_label)
  )

# STAR plot with updated legend labels
star_combined_plot <- ggplot(star_combined_plot_data, aes(x = date_factor)) +
  # Bars
  geom_col(aes(y = total_status4, fill = "All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_col(aes(y = status4_with_lvad, fill = "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD")) +
  # Line
  geom_line(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File", group = 1), 
            linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File"), 
             size = 2.5) +
  # Manual scales for legend
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications" = "#0072B2",
               "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD" = "#D55E00"),
    breaks = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications", "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c("All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File" = "#CC0000")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Status 4 Candidates and Overall LVAD Prevalence (OPTN STAR)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Number of Candidates"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1),
    color = guide_legend(order = 2)
  )

print(star_combined_plot)


# ============================================================================
# OPTIONAL: CREATE SIDE-BY-SIDE COMPARISON (SRTR vs STAR)
# ============================================================================

# Add data source labels
srtr_for_comparison <- combined_plot_data %>%
  mutate(data_source = "SRTR")

star_for_comparison <- star_combined_plot_data %>%
  mutate(data_source = "OPTN STAR")

# Combine both datasets
both_sources <- bind_rows(srtr_for_comparison, star_for_comparison)

# Comparison plot with updated legend labels
comparison_plot <- ggplot(both_sources, aes(x = date_factor)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = total_status4, fill = "All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_col(aes(y = status4_with_lvad, fill = "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File", group = 1), 
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = total_with_lvad, color = "All Candidates with LVAD per MCS File"), 
             size = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications" = "steelblue",
               "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD" = "coral"),
    breaks = c("All Candidates with Status 4 Justifications", "Candidates with Status 4 Justifications for LVAD")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "",
```
